query:
SELECT cr.id, cr.runSlot, cr.status, cr.errorMessage,
  COUNT(gs.id) as total_slides,
  SUM(CASE WHEN gs.status = 'ready' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ready_slides,
  SUM(CASE WHEN gs.status = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed_slides,
  SUM(CASE WHEN gs.assembledUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as assembled_slides
FROM content_runs cr
LEFT JOIN generated_slides gs ON gs.runId = cr.id
GROUP BY cr.id, cr.runSlot, cr.status, cr.errorMessage
ORDER BY cr.id DESC
LIMIT 8;
